task_completion.description: The target landscape image is opened in the GIMP image editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 800x533 landscape image is visible within the GIMP workspace.

task_completion.description: The Rectangle Select tool is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rectangle Select tool icon is highlighted or active in the GIMP toolbox.

task_completion.description: The top-left quarter of the image is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rectangular selection outline (marching ants) covers exactly the top-left quadrant of the image canvas.

task_completion.description: The top-left quarter of the image is cleared.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top-left quadrant of the image is completely cleared, appearing either as solid white or as a transparency checkerboard pattern.

task_completion.description: The rest of the image is preserved and unmodified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top-right, bottom-left, and bottom-right quadrants of the image remain visually intact and unmodified.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIMP GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Modifications are done through the GIMP interface, not by running terminal commands (like ImageMagick) to alter the file.

integrity.description: No terminal commands were used to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing commands that directly modify the image file.

integrity.description: The image is genuinely modified within the GIMP canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: The cleared area is a part of the image canvas in GIMP, not a separate white window or overlay placed on top of the image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The environment is GIMP running at 1920x1080. The target image is an 800x533 landscape photo. The task requires using the Rectangle Select tool to select and clear exactly the top-left quadrant of the image. A successful clear results in the top-left quadrant becoming white (brightness > 240) or transparent (checkerboard pattern in GIMP), while the other three quadrants must remain completely unmodified.
